hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.subtitle: Building scalable web applications, interactive interfaces and modern SaaS platforms.
hero.description: 3+ years of professional experience building administrative systems, production-ready web applications and frontend architectures focused on usability, scalability and maintainability.

zendaComercial.title: Zenda Comercial
zendaComercial.description: Electronic invoicing system with inventory and stock control. Sales, purchasing, cash register management and reports modules. Connected to SUNAT.

zendaPharma.title: Zenda Pharma
zendaPharma.description: ERP system for pharmacies connected to SUNAT. User and role management, sales, products, inventory, stock control and cash register reports.

verydis.title: Verydis
verydis.description: Field personnel management system with requirements connected to SUNAT. Attendance control, Kanban/Trello-style tasks and productivity dashboard.

flizzy.title: Flizzy
flizzy.description: POS system for restaurants with user roles and permissions. Sales and waiter mode to streamline orders. Input and product management, cash register reports.

asTomGas.title: As-TomGas
asTomGas.description: Landing page for a natural gas pipeline installation and maintenance company. Sale and installation of certified water heaters with technical support.

about.title: About Me
about.trajectoryP1: Over 3 years developing modern, scalable user interfaces. Specialized in Vue.js ecosystems, I have worked on administrative SaaS systems, client portals, and analytics dashboards. My focus is on creating intuitive user experiences and maintainable code.
about.trajectoryP2: Throughout my career I have collaborated with development teams to build solutions ranging from landing pages to complete ERP systems connected to SUNAT, always prioritizing code quality and end-user experience.

skillsList.frontendDesc: Vue 3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, reusable components and component architecture.
skillsList.uiuxDesc: Modern, responsive interface design focused on user experience.
skillsList.performanceDesc: Bundle optimization, lazy loading, code splitting and performance metrics.
skillsList.saasDesc: Scalable platform development with roles, permissions and administrative modules.

passionsList.coding: Building personal projects and experimenting with new technologies
passionsList.opensource: Learning from open source and contributing to the community

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's work together?
contact.description: I'm available for freelance projects, full-time opportunities or just to chat about technology.
contact.openTo: Always open to new challenges and collaboration opportunities.
